summary: Validated chatbot end-to-end on public homepage and backend API. Chat button is visible after load, chat window opens, message send returns valid assistant response, and POST /api/chat/message behaves correctly.

issues: Browser console shows repeated warning about preloaded font not used shortly after load (_next/static/media/...woff2).

action_items: Optional: review/remove unnecessary font preload to avoid console noise if not intentionally used on first paint.
critical_code_review_comments: ChatBotLoader visibility is controlled by NEXT_PUBLIC_CHAT_API_URL and is correctly mounted on homepage/public shell.
Backend chat endpoint catches provider exceptions and returns fallback message, avoiding unhandled 500 during provider errors.
seed_data_creation: Created transient chat sessions with TEST_ prefix via API test payloads.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Chatbot flow retested on https://nextjs-gemini.preview.emergentagent.com with data-testid selectors: chat-button -> chat-window -> chat-input -> chat-send-button. Assistant response returned successfully and no runtime page errors detected.
rca of the issue: Previously hidden chatbot was re-enabled via NEXT_PUBLIC_CHAT_API_URL gate in ChatBotLoader. Reproduction for this run: load homepage, wait for deferred client render (~3-4s idle callback), verify chat button appears, open chat window, send message, verify assistant response and backend POST /api/chat/message=200.
